MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for Nelle Thornton (Conservator/Trustee).

Ms. Greer requested a 30 day continuance stating that she had the accounting but that she needed to put it together. The matter was continued to February 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the Third Accounting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
